title: NLP-014-what-are-attention-mechanisms-and-their-benefits原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-014 What are Attention Mechanisms and their benefits?

 14. What are Attention Mechanisms and their benefits?
答案要点:
- 核心思想: 动态关注输入的不同部分
- 类型:
  - Self-Attention (序列内部)
  - Multi-Head Attention (多个表示子空间)
  - Cross-Attention (Encoder-Decoder)
- 优势:
  - 捕获长距离依赖
  - 可解释性 (Attention Weights)
  - 并行计算
- 应用: Transformer, BERT, GPT, T5

公式:

Attention(Q, K, V) = softmax(QK^T / √d_k) × V


质量评分: 95/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐
Category: NLP...

sections.title: 14. What are Attention Mechanisms and their benefits?
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
- **核心思想**: 动态关注输入的不同部分
- **类型**:
  - Self-Attention (序列内部)
  - Multi-Head Attention (多个表示子空间)
  - Cross-Attention (Encoder-Decoder)
- **优势**:
  - 捕获长距离依赖
  - 可解释性 (Attention Weights)
  - 并行计算
- **应用**: Transformer, BERT, GPT, T5

**公式:**
```
Attention(Q, K, V) = softmax(QK^T / √d_k) × V
```

**质量评分**: 95/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
